author: dsocek
body: Similar WA exist for Qwen image https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/blob/d526dc93e89aa4d806a9111aab496b0bc04c8937/vllm_omni/diffusion/models/qwen_image/qwen_image_transformer.py#L54-L58).  I am not sure if this covers all potential PEFT->vllm-omni naming conflicting cases.  The manager already computes `_packed_modules_mapping` from each model's `stacked_params_mapping` at init. Worth to see if maybe we could drive the mapper from that instead, so fused-projection renames (e.g. `to_q/k/v` to `to_qkv`, etc) are all covered automatically for any model?

author: tthakkal
body: No, I will remove this change and keep this PR specific to sdxl support
